scripts.build:all: vite build && vite build --config library-dev/vite.config.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');function c(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const sp=path.join(s,e.name),dp=path.join(d,e.name);e.isDirectory()?c(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}c('database','dist/database')"
